text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I enter this space. The glass doors create a transition between two realms: the quiet, almost clinical corridor and this vibrant, thought-provoking exhibit. Inside, the R+D wall promises discovery and the pursuit of new ideas. I am drawn to the intersection of art, technology, and human experience on display here. There is a quiet thrill in knowing I am about to learn something new, yet also a gentle unease—how will these innovations reshape what it means to be human? The environment invites me to contemplate both the possibilities and the responsibilities that come with progress.
